diagram.description: Generate an HTML diagram for any technical topic
diagram.template:
Generate a self-contained HTML page that visually explains: $ARGUMENTS

Use the visual-explainer skill. Read the relevant template first from .opencode/skills/visual-explainer/templates/.

Rules:
1. Pick a constrained aesthetic (Blueprint, Editorial, Paper/ink, Monochrome terminal)
2. Use a distinctive font pairing (NOT Inter/Roboto/Arial/system-ui)
3. For Mermaid: theme 'base', zoom controls, center diagram
4. Write to ~/.agent/diagrams/ with descriptive filename
5. Open with xdg-open
6. Tell me the file path

diff-review.description: Visual diff review with architecture comparison
diff-review.template:
Perform a visual diff review.
1. Run: !`git diff --stat`
2. Run: !`git diff HEAD~1`
3. Generate an HTML page with: KPI cards (files/lines), architecture impact, before/after panels, risk table.
4. Write to ~/.agent/diagrams/diff-review.html, open with xdg-open.
5. Tell me the file path.

plan-review.description: Compare a plan against the codebase with risk assessment
plan-review.template: Compare the implementation plan against the actual codebase. Generate an HTML page with: plan summary, implementation status table (planned vs actual), risk assessment, gap analysis. Write to ~/.agent/diagrams/plan-review.html, open with xdg-open.

project-recap.description: Mental model snapshot for context-switching back to a project
project-recap.template: Generate a visual project recap: architecture diagram, directory structure, recent activity, open TODOs, key decisions. Write to ~/.agent/diagrams/project-recap.html, open with xdg-open.

mnemolite.description: MnemoLite MCP Server - Code intelligence with hybrid search, graph traversal, and semantic memories
